classification.reason: multiple selected windows or feasible alternative paths exist
multiple selected windows or feasible alternative paths exist

augment_funnel_stage_meanings.raw_overlap_candidate_count: Physically overlaps the hot range before any insertion checks.
augment_funnel_stage_meanings.schedulable_after_t_pre_d_min_count: Still satisfies the t_pre / d_min timing gate before terminal-conflict rejection.
augment_funnel_stage_meanings.conflict_free_count: Can be inserted into the current plan without terminal occupancy conflict.
augment_funnel_stage_meanings.relief_path_ready_count: Conflict-free and can generate at least one feasible relief path.
augment_funnel_stage_meanings.selected_count: Chosen by the global augment selection policy within the total budget.
augment_funnel_stage_meanings.applied_count: Actually inserted into the plan after the final scheduling pass.
